Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Prevents LLM API usage spikes by limiting token consumption per key based on tokens-per-minute (TPM) rate or token quota over specified periods (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly). Returns 429 when rate exceeded, 403 when quota exceeded.

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Sets token quotas over configurable time periods (hourly to yearly) per consumer. Enables fair distribution of tokens across multiple applications and developer teams.

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Enforces content safety checks on LLM prompts and completions using Azure AI Content Safety service. Blocks harmful content across categories: Hate, SelfHarm, Sexual, Violence with configurable severity thresholds (0-7).

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Detects and blocks jailbreak attempts and adversarial prompt attacks. Set shield-prompt="true" to enable protection against user attacks on LLM systems.

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Applies organization-specific blocklists to prevent specific content from being sent or received. Integrates with Azure AI Content Safety blocklist feature.

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Looks up semantically similar prompts in cache using vector proximity comparison. Reduces LLM API calls and improves response times by reusing completions from similar previous requests.

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Stores prompt completions in Azure Managed Redis cache with vector embeddings. Works with llm-semantic-cache-lookup to enable semantic caching that can reduce LLM costs by 30-50%.

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Emits token consumption metrics to Application Insights with custom dimensions (client IP, API ID, user ID, etc.). Enables tracking and analytics of token usage per consumer for billing and optimization.

Tier Support: Developer, Basic, Basic v2, Standard, Standard v2, Premium, Premium v2
What is the feature for: Estimates prompt tokens on the APIM gateway before sending to backend. Minimizes unnecessary requests to LLM backend when prompt already exceeds the configured token limit.
Streamlined wizard to import AI model schemas from Microsoft Foundry. Auto-configures authentication using managed identity and pre-configures policies for scalability, security, and observability.
Import and configure OpenAI-compatible or passthrough LLM endpoints as APIs. Supports models from various providers including Azure OpenAI, Amazon Bedrock, and self-hosted models.

Feature Name: Export REST API as MCP Server
What is the feature for: Expose existing REST APIs as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Enables AI agents to discover and consume your APIs through the standardized MCP interface.
Govern existing MCP servers through APIM gateway. Apply policies, authentication, and monitoring to MCP traffic without modifying the underlying MCP server.
Import and manage Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol APIs. Enables governance and monitoring of agent-to-agent communication through the APIM gateway.
Distributes traffic across multiple AI backends using round-robin, weighted, priority-based, or session-aware algorithms. Optimizes utilization of PTU (Provisioned Throughput Unit) instances.
Stops forwarding requests to unresponsive AI backends. Features dynamic trip duration using Retry-After header from backend for precise and timely recovery.
Authenticate to Azure AI services using APIM's managed identity. Eliminates the need for API keys and enables secure, credential-free authentication to LLM backends.
Configure OAuth authorization for AI applications and agents to access APIs or MCP servers. Uses API Management's credential manager for secure token management.
Apply authentication and authorization policies to MCP server endpoints. Ensures only authorized clients can access tools exposed through MCP protocol.
Log prompts and completions to Azure Monitor and Application Insights. Enables auditing, compliance tracking, and troubleshooting of AI interactions.
Pre-built workbook in APIM portal showing token consumption patterns across AI APIs. Visualizes usage by consumer, API, time period for cost management.
Register APIs and MCP servers in organizational catalog. Enables self-service discovery through API Center portal and synchronization with APIM.

Feature Name: MCP Server Registry in API Center
What is the feature for: Centralized registry for MCP servers in Azure API Center. Enables discovery and governance of tools available to AI agents across the organization.
Export APIs from API Center to Microsoft Copilot Studio. Extends the capabilities of AI agents and copilots with your organization's APIs.
Integrate AI gateway directly into Microsoft Foundry control plane. Govern AI models, agents, and tools from within Foundry environment with centralized inventory.
Register agents running anywhere (Azure, other clouds, on-premises) into Foundry control plane. Enables centralized inventory, governance, and telemetry for all agents.
Register MCP tools hosted across any environment for automatic governance and discovery. Tools appear in Foundry inventory for consumption by agents.
Deploy API Management gateways in multiple Azure regions. Provides geographic distribution and resilience for AI API traffic with regional backends.
Deploy APIM gateway in containers on-premises or other clouds. Enables AI gateway capabilities in air-gapped or hybrid environments.
Federated API management with workspace-level gateways. Enables team autonomy with centralized governance for large enterprise AI deployments.
Get early access to new AI gateway features before GA. Participate in shaping product direction with feedback on latest innovations.
